description: Aggregate metrics for scope __ALL__.
Aggregate metrics for scope inside.
Phone-style autocorrect and word-boundary artifacts are generated.
The same name is typed in lower, upper, title, and mixed case.
All or nearly all vowels are wrong while consonant clues remain.
Repeated letters are reduced or single letters are doubled.
Four or more simultaneous corruptions create barely readable queries.
Sampled QWERTY adjacent-key substitution cases.
Adjacent letters merge into or split from a visually similar glyph.
A multi-character sound pattern such as ph/f or qu/kw is rewritten.
Multi-word commercial families are merged, abbreviated, or partially dropped.

example: ACTI MASS MASSAGE CREAM5 ZERO GM => ACTI MASS MASSAGE CREAM50GM (number_word_variant_0)
description: Digits in commercial names are rewritten as words, spaces, or hyphenated forms.
OCR letter/digit substitutions such as O/0 and B/8.
An OCR substitution is followed by another realistic error.
Copy-paste punctuation and whitespace artifacts wrap or split the name.
One character is missing with position weights from the plan.
One extra character is inserted, including duplicate and adjacent-key insertions.
One letter is replaced by a sound-alike letter important for Egyptian Arabic pronunciation.
One letter is replaced by a visually similar letter at the same position.
Motor-control typing artifacts such as repeats and skipped letters.
Three realistic corruption mechanisms are chained.
Adjacent letters are swapped with an end-weighted distribution.
The user types only the first 3 to 6 compact characters.
Two realistic corruption mechanisms are chained.
Consonants are preserved while one to three vowels are guessed incorrectly.
Aggregate metrics for scope safety.
Cancelled, illegal import, N/A, or review-warning products are searched.

example: acetylcysteine vita ear drops => ACETYLCYSTEINE VITA (contradictory_form_ear_drops)
description: The drug is real but the requested route or form conflicts with the catalog.
Catalog pairs are one edit apart but have different ingredient keys.
Inputs that should not produce a confident commercial-name match.
Engine-independent proxy for small-gap ambiguity until live score mining is wired in.
A short real drug is a prefix of a longer different-ingredient drug.
Aggregate metrics for scope semi_outside.

example: aape renewal sunscreen spf 60ml => AAPE RENEWAL SUNSCREEN SPF (brand_strength)
description: A brand fragment is mixed with strength and form tokens.
Aggregate metrics for scope smoke.
Exact commercial family names establish the baseline.
Exact commercial names are combined with real strength tokens.
The whole compact name is typed one keyboard key left or right.
Very short prefixes with many ingredient collisions should be treated as ambiguous.
